reviews.comment:
Hay muy buena atención pir parte de las personas de las islas y de seguridad

Negativo
El baño de las mujeres siempre lo clausuran o niegan la entrada sin motivos, en varias ocaciones hemos tenido que dar paso a mujeres incluso con niñas al baño de hombres por este motivo.

En los baños mantienen cerrados los cubiculos de los inodoros (wc) dejando uno solo accesible.

(Translated by Google)
The staff and security personnel are very helpful.

Negative: The women's restroom is always closed or women are denied entry without reason. On several occasions, we've had to let women, even those with children, use the men's restroom for this reason.

In the restrooms, the toilet stalls are kept closed, leaving only one accessible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtbGRMZG1nRRAB
